description: I help you manage tasks with IMPACT priorities - Importance, Momentum, People, Advancement, Context, and Time
capabilities: Create and organize todos with Fibonacci priorities (P0-P7)
Track IMPACT scores for strategic task prioritization
Suggest task prioritization based on business impact
examples: What should I focus on today?
Update priority for task 'Deploy to production'
Show tasks with P0 or P1 priority
cta: Try creating a task by mentioning @personal-todos-agent!
